stemHtml: The pilots of an aircraft are experiencing an emergency that requires ditching. During the ditching procedure, the co-pilot provides suggestions but the captain is not paying attention to the co-pilot although the co-pilot is more experienced in ditching. Identify the types of their behaviour.

options.a: The captain is laissez-faire, the co-pilot is submissive.
options.b: The captain is synergic, the co-pilot is submissive.
options.c: The captain is autocratic, the co-pilot is submissive.
options.d: The captain is autocratic, the co-pilot is aggressive.
